steps.label: cause
steps.text: A wine merchant purchases grapes, must or wine from growers and takes responsibility for blending, maturation or bottling.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: Selecting lots and controlling blending and ageing lets the merchant shape consistency, structure and market style across multiple sources.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: Trade intermediaries can influence the finished style rather than acting only as passive resellers.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: a negociant can shape style through lot selection, blending and maturation.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
